narrative:
Musk West (precinct in Washington County) has 920 registered voters, with 44.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.3 percentage points.
